task_description: Fix all bugs in the NEON DRIFT cyberpunk endless runner game and add significant new features including proper time stop/slow-motion, time rewind, magnet, shield power-ups, slide/duck mechanic, double jump, score multiplier, and difficulty milestones.

verification.summary: JavaScript syntax validated with node --check (no errors). All 28+ getElementById calls verified against HTML IDs (no missing references). All POWERUP_TYPE enum values present (TIMESTOP, GLITCH, REWIND, MAGNET, SHIELD). Game architecture verified: slide mechanic, double jump, score multiplier, shield, magnet attraction, time rewind checkpoint system all implemented correctly.
